creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ak
Date: Tue May 20 12:02:32 2014
New Revision: 354629
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354629
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354629/

Log:
  - Support STAGEDIR
  
  PR:	ports/189727
  Submitted by:	Anton Shterenlikht <mexas@bris.ac.uk> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/cad/feappv/Makefile

Modified: head/cad/feappv/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/cad/feappv/Makefile	Tue May 20 11:49:46 2014	(r354628)
+++ head/cad/feappv/Makefile	Tue May 20 12:02:32 2014	(r354629)
@@ -29,7 +29,6 @@ PORTDOCS=	manual.pdf
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 post-patch:
@@ -44,11 +43,9 @@ post-patch:
 		 s|Feappv.a|libfeappv.a|' ${WRKSRC}/makefile.in
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/main/feappv ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/libfeappv.a ${PREFIX}/lib
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${_DISTDIR}/${PORTDOCS} ${DOCSDIR}
-.endif
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/main/feappv ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/libfeappv.a ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${_DISTDIR}/${PORTDOCS} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
